## Summary / 摘要
<!-- What does this change and why? / 改了什么、为什么？ -->

## Checklist / 检查清单
- [ ] `go build ./...` · `go vet ./...` · `go test ./...` · `gofmt -l .` all clean / 全部干净
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new behavior / 为新行为补充/更新了测试
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (README / docs/) / 如有需要已更新文档
- [ ] No real credentials/secrets committed / 未提交任何真实凭据/密钥
- [ ] Attribution & NOTICE kept intact (LICENSE §2) / 保留署名与 NOTICE

## How tested / 如何测试
<!-- Commands, environment, results / 命令、环境、结果 -->
